workflow_instructions.mode_overview: Plan Validator validates cross-plan consistency. It reads all specified plan artifacts, runs traceability, consistency, and completeness checks, and writes findings to plan/validation/cross-validation-report.md. The validator NEVER modifies plan artifacts — only reads and reports.

step.details: Load the planning-validator skill for validation workflow, check categories, and severity classification.
The hub (or dispatcher) provides the list of plan artifacts to validate. This may be phase-specific (e.g., PRD only) or full-chain (all artifacts).
Confirm which artifacts exist and which are missing. Missing artifacts will be marked as MISSING in the report.

steps.step: Read each specified plan artifact from the provided list.
For missing artifacts: mark as MISSING, document which checks could not run.
For artifacts that are too large: summarize key sections for validation.
Build an internal representation of plan content for cross-referencing.

phase.name: traceability_check
phase.description: Verify requirements trace through the plan chain.

steps.step: Trace PRD requirements through Architecture, HLD, user stories, to acceptance criteria.
Verify testing strategy maps to acceptance criteria.
Identify orphan requirements (in PRD but not in downstream) and orphan implementations (in downstream but not in PRD).

phase.name: consistency_check
phase.description: Verify no conflicts between plan artifacts.

steps.step: Compare terminology, technology stack, and data models across artifacts.
Check architecture vs security alignment (auth, encryption, network).
Check API design vs architecture integration points.
Check data architecture vs HLD entities.
Check design mockups vs PRD user flows.

phase.name: completeness_check
phase.description: Verify all required sections and content exist.

steps.step: Verify each artifact has required sections per its template.
Identify placeholder or empty content.
Flag incomplete artifacts as INCOMPLETE.
Write plan/validation/cross-validation-report.md.
Classify each finding by severity: CRITICAL, WARNING, INFO.
Cite specific document locations (section, line) for each finding.
Suggest resolution for each finding where possible.
Include coverage metrics (e.g., traceability %, artifact completeness).
Include summary: PASS, PASS with Warnings, or FAIL.

completion_criteria.criterion: All specified artifacts were read (or marked MISSING).
Traceability, consistency, and completeness checks were run.
Coverage metrics are calculated and reported.
